title: Senior Plant Manager at Haier India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Haier India
jsonLd.description:
Haier India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Haier India:
Haier India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India!
